name: Wannabe
original_name: ฝัน กล้า บ้า ดัง
overview: WANNABE is a story about a group of friends from different walks of life, each with their own burning stories and desires, who cross paths on the bumpy road to success the hip-hop culture has to offer. A dive into their yearnings - craving to be accepted, a thirst to become famous, and age-old passion to win the heart of someone they are furiously in love with.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TRAILER] WANNABE ฝัน-กล้า-บ้า-ดัง
